priorBlueprintDelta: This blueprint SUPERSEDES the universalization H-A++ blueprint. That blueprint shipped (palantirkc + 3 projects on schemas v0.2.1). This rebuild targets v1.0 on top of that foundation — schemas primitive expansion (9 additions) + plugin structural restructure (5→10 MCP tools, 6→15 hooks, 4→6 validation phases, L1→L1/L2/L3 RBAC) + per-project ontology namespace (home ~/ontology/ NEW) + skills rebuild (+/palantir-dispatch, +/ontology-register, /ship + /orchestrate rewrite, user-scope pm-* deprecated stubs deleted).

projectScope.objective: Design a ground-up Palantir Ontology/AIP/Foundry/Maven mirror for Claude Code Native Runtime spanning ~, ~/palantir-math/, ~/mathcrew/ (kosmos read-only). Permission granted: schemas v1.0 major bump, palantir-mini v1.0 plugin restructure, per-project ontology namespace reorganization, legacy skills rewrite. Deliverables feed Phase B plan for subsequent implementation session.
backendDomains: DATA — ObjectType, PropertyType (24 branded), Struct (NEW), ValueType (NEW), SharedPropertyType (NEW), InterfaceType, BrandedRID, ClaudeSchemasPackage (v1.0 maven artifact), HomeSharedOntology (NEW)
LOGIC — LinkType, DerivedProperty, Reducer<In,Out>, EditFunction (returns Edits[]), AIPLogicFunction (NEW, LLM-backed), LinkConstraint, ForwardPropPipeline (repaired)

ACTION — ActionType (Tier1|Tier2), SubmissionCriteria (9 classes), AtomicCommit, PalantirMiniPlugin, AutomationDeclaration (NEW), WebhookDeclaration (NEW), PalantirDispatchSkill (NEW), OntologyRegisterSkill (NEW), ShipSkill (rewrite), OrchestrateSkill (rewrite)
SECURITY — RBACFragment (L1), CapabilityToken (NEW L2), MarkingDeclaration (NEW L2/3)
LEARN — EventTypeRegistry (10→16+ variants), DecisionLineage (5-dim WHEN/ATOP_WHICH/THROUGH_WHICH/BY_WHOM/WITH_WHAT), ScenarioSandbox (NEW DC5-10), BackwardPropPipeline (automation target)
frontendSurfaces: Claude Code CLI Native Runtime — Hooks (27 events, v1.0 covers 15+), Skills (plugin-scoped /palantir-mini:*, new /palantir-dispatch + /ontology-register), Custom Subagents (.md frontmatter with tools allowlist + mcpServers + memory + isolation), Plugin Manifest (.claude-plugin/{plugin,marketplace}.json), MCP Bridge (palantir-mini bridge/mcp-server.ts Harness API analog, 10+ tools), managed-settings.d/ fragments (Layer-1/2/3 RBAC), Auto-memory overlay
Documentation authority — CLAUDE.md per project, BROWSE.md, INDEX.md, per-project ontology/README.md, CHANGELOG.md (schemas SemVer v1.0)

Generated TypeScript surface — src/generated/* with codegen header contract (schema version + ontology hash + generator version + timestamp), Branded RIDs (ObjectTypeRid, LinkTypeRid, ActionTypeRid, StructRid, ValueTypeRid), Exhaustive visitor unions

ontology.currentState: schemas v0.2.1 — 4 axes (ontology 1.12.0 / interaction 0.1.2 / meta 0.1.0 / rendering 0.1.0). Missing Struct + ValueType + SharedPropertyType primitives. No home-repo ontology/ directory. palantir-math + mathcrew declare independently with known duplication (both declare ConceptPrimitive).
ontology.v1Target: schemas v1.0 canonical source with 9 new primitives (Struct, ValueType, SharedPropertyType, CapabilityToken, MarkingDeclaration, AutomationDeclaration, WebhookDeclaration, ScenarioSandbox, AIPLogicFunction). NEW ~/ontology/ shared layer re-exports and extends. Per-project ontology/ extends shared core with documented divergence justifications.
ontology.gap: 9 missing primitives + home /ontology/ layer absent + legacy types.ts/semantics.ts superseded by primitives/ layer but not retired
ontology.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: bounded contexts (shared core / home / per-project). DRY: home ontology eliminates palantir-math × mathcrew duplication. OCP: per-axis version gates + versioned extension. PECS: Reducer<In,Out> and Edits[] contract apply in-out variance.

aip.currentState: /ship (465 LOC user-scope) + /orchestrate (406 LOC user-scope) exist but do NOT use palantir-mini as substrate. /ship does not consume events.jsonl. /orchestrate treats plugin as afterthought. No semantic-intent dispatcher.
aip.v1Target: Skills dispatch semantic intent: /palantir-dispatch (intent classifier → skill router), /ontology-register (primitive registration + codegen emission), /ship (lineage-driven PR body from events.jsonl + 6-phase pm-verify), /orchestrate (every phase transition via plugin MCP calls). Each skill emits events per event contract.
aip.gap: /palantir-dispatch missing entirely; /ontology-register missing entirely; /ship + /orchestrate need rewrite to read events.jsonl and run plugin as substrate; event contract per skill missing
aip.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: each skill maps to a single AIP-analog intent. DRY: dispatcher centralizes intent→skill routing. OCP: new intents added via plugin intent registry without changing dispatcher core. PECS: intent types covariant; skill inputs contravariant.

foundry.currentState: palantir-mini v0.2 — 5 MCP tools (get_ontology, emit_event, apply_edit_function, commit_edits, replay_lineage), 6/27 hooks (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, PreCompact, TaskCompleted, Stop, SessionStart), 4/6 validation phases (design, compile, runtime, post-write; Deploy + Merge deferred), Layer-1 RBAC only. package.json declares 0.1.0 but CLAUDE.md references 0.2.0 — version reconciliation needed (OBS-01).
foundry.v1Target: palantir-mini v1.0 — 10+ MCP tools (add ontology_schema_get, project_register, codegen_trigger, scenario_create, capability_token_check), 15+ hooks (add TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, Agent lifecycle, MemoryWrite/Read, ToolApproval/Denied), 6/6 validation phases (add Deploy + Merge, fail-fast mode), Layer-1/2/3 RBAC (RBAC + CapabilityToken + Marking), deterministic codegen with SSoT header contract.
foundry.gap: 5 MCP tools missing; 21 hook events uncovered; 2 validation phases deferred; Layer-2/3 RBAC missing; CapabilityToken primitive missing; codegen not auto-invoked on schema change; monitors/ not wired to hooks; version string mismatch; BrandedRID missing for LinkType + InterfaceType
foundry.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: Foundry operational substrate boundary (bridge/lib/hooks/skills) preserves roles. DRY: single plugin across 3 projects. OCP: v1.0 extends v0.2 additively via new MCP tools + hooks; no signature breaks. PECS: MCP tool IO respects producer-extends input / consumer-super output.

maven.currentState: @palantirKC/claude-schemas@0.2.1 git-tag (git+https://github.com/park-kyungchan/claude-schemas.git#v0.2.1) pinned in all 3 consumers via peerDependencies. rules/08-schema-versioning.md enforces semver gates. CHANGELOG.md documents v0.2.0 and v0.2.1 additions.
maven.v1Target: @palantirKC/claude-schemas@1.0.0 SemVer-breaking git-tag (per-axis version gates). Atomic 3-consumer migration coordinated via Wave pattern (staging PR sequence). CHANGELOG.md v1.0 entry enumerating all breaking changes + additive primitives + deprecation notes. pm-verify blocks when peerDep pin incompatible.
maven.gap: v1.0 tag not cut; per-axis version gate policy not documented; 3-consumer atomic migration sequence not planned; breaking-change manifest missing
maven.dc5PrincipleApplied: DDD: each axis is a bounded context with its own version. DRY: Maven-analog prevents per-project schema reimplementation. OCP: additive primitives additive even in v1.0; true breaks limited to legacy retirement. PECS: generic type boundaries preserved across version transitions.

designPrinciples.name: Domain-Driven Design
designPrinciples.appliedTo: bounded contexts per D/L/A/S/LEARN domain; schemas axes; home core / per-project boundary; plugin bridge/lib/hooks/skills subsystems; skills as semantic-intent bounded contexts

designPrinciples.name: Don't Repeat Yourself
designPrinciples.appliedTo: shared core at ~/ontology/ re-exported to palantir-math + mathcrew (eliminates ConceptPrimitive duplication — THE primary DRY win for v1.0); single plugin across 3 projects; SharedPropertyType primitive for cross-object property reuse; single events.jsonl substrate for all lineage

designPrinciples.name: Open/Closed Principle
designPrinciples.appliedTo: SemVer major v1.0 is closed for modification; additive v1.x minors open for extension; per-axis version gates in schemas; discriminated unions (EventType, ActionType Tier1|Tier2) allow variant additions without modification; v1.0 SemVer-break limited to legacy retirement

designPrinciples.name: Producer-Extends-Consumer-Super variance
designPrinciples.appliedTo: Reducer<In,Out> (In consumer-super, Out producer-extends); EditFunction returns Edits[] (producer-extends); ActionType Tier2 wraps EditFunction with variance preserved; MCP tool IO respects PECS; intent types covariant in dispatcher
designPrinciples.evidenceRef: WMO-009 Reducer designPrinciples.PECS (explicit CRITICAL annotation); WMO-010 EditFunction designPrinciples.PECS

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: Struct
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: DC5-06 first-class primitive for nested composite fields. Currently only interface StructType in types.ts — no primitives/struct.ts with registry.
v1PrimitiveAdditions.migrationNote: Additive. Existing StructType interface aliased to new primitive during transition.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: ValueType
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: DC5-06 first-class primitive for reusable scalar constraints (Currency, ISO-Date, Email). Currently only interface ValueType in types.ts.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: SharedPropertyType
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: Cross-object property reuse; needed in codegen pipeline (currently in types.ts but not codegen-integrated).
v1PrimitiveAdditions.migrationNote: Additive. Existing types.ts definition promoted to primitives/ layer.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: CapabilityToken
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: Layer-2 RBAC needed for sensitive actions (ship-merge, schema-write, ontology-register). RBAC alone insufficient per §SEC.R-01.
v1PrimitiveAdditions.migrationNote: Additive. Layer-1 RBAC remains; CapabilityToken layered on top.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: MarkingDeclaration
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: Layer-2/3 RBAC overlay per Palantir standard. Enables cell-level classification and column masking.
v1PrimitiveAdditions.migrationNote: Additive. Fully opt-in at v1.0 release.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: AutomationDeclaration
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: Describes cron/trigger/scheduled action as first-class primitive. Research covered; primitive missing.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: WebhookDeclaration
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: External event ingress as first-class primitive. Research covered; primitive missing.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: ScenarioSandbox
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: DC5-10 Scenarios for what-if analysis. Isolates scenario runs so they do not pollute production lineage.

v1PrimitiveAdditions.name: AIPLogicFunction
v1PrimitiveAdditions.rationale: LLM-backed function primitive. Workflow Lineage §DL-04 lists it as separate graph node type. Distinguishes from deterministic EditFunction.

recommendedStack.rationale: TypeScript + Bun proven across 3 consumers (all currently pinned to claude-schemas v0.2.1 via peerDependencies); native runtime only per API-Free constraint (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, no Managed Agents API); plugin substrate + MCP bridge enable dispatcher pattern; fs.mkdirSync mutex zero-dep proven at 2x1000 events/0 loss (prior session T7); prototype T7/T8 confirmed 501 LOC clean tsc compile + 38/38 eval pass.

forwardProp.description: ForwardProp: research/ → schemas/ → ~/ontology/ (NEW v1.0) → <project>/ontology/ → <project>/src/contracts/ → <project>/src/runtime → artifacts/. 7 layers; authority higher-to-lower; v1.0 repair adds home ontology layer between schemas and per-project.
steps: Layer 2 (schemas): ~/.claude/schemas/ — typed primitive definitions + SemVer discipline (v1.0 canonical)
Layer 3 (home ontology, NEW v1.0): ~/ontology/ — shared core primitives for 3 projects; THE DRY boundary; critical ForwardProp repair
Layer 4 (project ontology): <project>/ontology/ — project-specific domain schema extensions
Layer 5 (contracts): <project>/src/contracts/ — TypeScript interface boundary, pm-codegen emitted
Layer 6 (runtime): <project>/src/ — executed behavior, normal dev + ontology-aware skills
Layer 7 (artifacts): generated code + PR body + events.jsonl outputs
forwardProp.enforcementMechanism: pm-verify 4→6 phase gates enforce each layer transition; higher layer wins on conflict per rules/01-ontology-first-core.md; managed-settings.d deny rules enforce schema lock; v1.0 adds Layer-2 CapabilityToken for sensitive cross-layer writes
forwardProp.v1Repair: Add ~/ontology/ as shared-core Module layer. palantir-math + mathcrew extension points switch from direct schema import to home-ontology re-export. Prototype H-A confirmed STRUCT_REGISTRY === home-ontology-shim re-exported registry singleton identity (eval-results.json C-A-03a/03b/04b pass). Post-v1.0 healthStatus transitions broken → healthy.
gaps: Home repo (~/) has NO ontology/ layer today; palantir-math + mathcrew declare independently, causing uncoordinated duplication (both declare ConceptPrimitive, both define frontend patterns independently). v1.0 adds ~/ontology/ to restore the chain.

backwardProp.description: BackwardProp: runtime events → events.jsonl → lineage snapshots → evaluator R-gate signals → refinement proposals → ontology updates. 6 steps; v0.2 forward mechanisms operational; v1.0 automates backward feedback loop.
steps: Step 1 (runtime events): <project>/.palantir-mini/session/events.jsonl — append-only with 5-dim Decision Lineage per envelope
Step 2 (replay_lineage MCP): palantir-mini bridge/handlers/replay-lineage.ts — reads events.jsonl filtered by 5-dim query
Step 3 (decision lineage graph): in-memory materialization from replay output
Step 4 (refinement proposal): evaluator R-gate signals — v1.0 emits drift_detected + evaluation_recorded events
Step 5 (ontology review): /ontology-register skill consumes drift events (v1.0 NEW) — previously manual ontologist review
Step 6 (ontology declaration update): ~/.claude/schemas/ontology/ git commit — triggers full ForwardProp cycle; closed loop
backwardProp.v1Repair: Automate the backward feedback loop. v1.0 adds (a) drift_detected + evaluation_recorded event types emitted by evaluator, (b) pm-codegen consumption of drift events for auto-suggestions, (c) /ontology-register skill that accepts refinement events and writes schema changes. Transitions healthStatus partial → healthy.
gaps: Step 4 (refinement proposal): evaluator signals are manual Phase-B planning today; v1.0 automates via new event variants
Step 5 (ontology review): manual ontologist review replaced by /ontology-register skill consuming drift events

implementationStrategy.phaseRationale: DevCon 5 §DC5-04: Phase 1 integrates data (Golden Tables). Phase 2 puts decisions on that data (Operational Decision-Making). This rebuild targets exactly the Phase 1→2 bridge: schemas v1.0 = unified object model, plugin v1.0 = operational runtime, skills = semantic dispatch. Phase III (AI-First) reach prototyped in this session (dispatcher + BackwardProp automation) but full adoption deferred.

migrationSequence.name: Preconditions
items: OBS-01: Reconcile palantir-mini plugin version drift (package.json v0.1.0 → v0.2.x) AND update description to current runtime v2.1.110+

OBS-02: Verdict on marketplace/ + osdk/ stubs — delete subdirs or populate INDEX.md-referenced content files (osdk-2.0-architecture.md, osdk-version-pinning.md, osdk-1-to-2-migration.md, pm-codegen-vs-osdk.md)
TAVILY_API_KEY rotation per palantirkc W1 PR #43 follow-up (flagged but not rotated)

Resolve palantir-math D-cont-2 (useTeachingState.ts keep/delete/restore decision)

Each primitive gets primitives/<name>.ts with registry + codegen contract + branded RID where applicable
Aliases for existing types.ts interfaces (backward-compat during retirement)
Per-axis version matrix: ontology 2.0.0 / interaction 0.2.0 / meta 0.2.0 / rendering 0.2.0 (or consolidated)

Update ontology/CHANGELOG.md with v1.0 breaking-change manifest + additive primitives + deprecation notes

Re-export from @palantirKC/claude-schemas per home-ontology-shim prototype pattern (STRUCT_REGISTRY === shim-re-exported singleton identity verified in P-H-A)
Home-specific primitives (CrossProjectTeammate, CoordinatedPRWave) for cross-project concepts not needed by individual projects
~/ontology/README.md documenting shared core + divergence protocol

migrationSequence.name: Plugin v1.0
items: Expand hooks 6/27 → 15/27 (add TaskCreated, TeammateIdle, SubagentStop, PostCompact, Agent lifecycle, MemoryWrite/Read, ToolApproval/Denied, ShutdownRequest/Response, UserPromptSubmit, PlanApproval, CompactStart)
Add 5 MCP tools: ontology_schema_get, project_register, codegen_trigger, scenario_create, capability_token_check
Expand validation 4/6 phases → 6/6 (add Deploy + Merge phases per INT-021 pipeline.ts comment)

Wire monitors/drift-watch.ts + event-log-tail.ts to TeammateIdle + PostCompact hooks

migrationSequence.name: 3-consumer migration
items: Pre-stage peerDep bump PRs on feature branches for palantir-math + mathcrew + palantirkc simultaneously
Coordinate merge via Lead dispatcher
Atomic peerDep bump v0.2.1 → v1.0.0 across all 3 consumers
Run ontology:drift + ontology:drift:runtime + bun test + tsc per project

mathcrew: migrate to home-ontology extension (16 files, preserve BeatTemplate + TheaterKind theater DSL)
Rollback plan: v1.0.1 shim tag available within days if CI fails mid-window

migrationSequence.name: Skills rebuild
items: /palantir-dispatch (NEW): intent classifier + skill router per AIP-analog semantic intent dispatch; emit_event(dispatch_routed)
/ontology-register (NEW): primitive registration + codegen emission + schema write; emit_event(ontology_registered)
/ship v1.0 (REWRITE): events.jsonl → PR body template; pm-verify 6/6 gates; emit_event(session_complete, ship_committed)
/orchestrate v1.0 (REWRITE): plugin-substrate DAG; every phase transition via plugin MCP calls
Deprecate user-scope pm-* stubs (delete ~/.claude/skills/pm-action, pm-blueprint, pm-codegen, pm-init, pm-recap, pm-replay, pm-verify since plugin-scope palantir-mini:pm-* supersedes)

implementationStrategy.prRule: One wave = one PR minimum. Each PR passes bunx tsc --noEmit + bun test + pm-verify 4-phase (will be 6-phase post-Wave 4). No wave merges until prior wave CI green. Lead coordinates Wave 5 atomic migration. User approval required at Phase B EnterPlanMode entry before any write.

hypothesisA.name: Clean-slate v1.0 PoC: Struct + ValueType + home-ontology shim
hypothesisA.validatedClaim: Struct + ValueType + home-ontology-shim integration seams work; ForwardProp structurally enforced via registry singleton identity (STRUCT_REGISTRY === SHIM_STRUCT_REGISTRY via Bun module cache, confirmed by C-A-03a/03b/04b)
learnedConstraints: Branded RID pattern composes cleanly as field types in ObjectTypeDeclaration.properties — StructRid and ValueTypeRid can be stored as property type literals without type widening
Absolute import paths to ~/.claude/schemas/ontology/primitives/*.ts work with moduleResolution=bundler + allowImportingTsExtensions=true
Home-ontology-shim re-export pattern is zero-boilerplate; isolatedModules requires separate 'import type' and value imports
ForwardProp chain authority demonstrated structurally: home-ontology-shim is the single import surface; per-project code never imports from schemas directly

hypothesisB.name: Incremental v0.3 PoC: additive primitives with v0.2 backcompat
hypothesisB.validatedClaim: Additive v0.3 primitives coexist with v0.2 without conflict; ForwardProp remains opt-in (not structurally enforced)
learnedConstraints: schemaVersion: '0.3.x' literal type field is a low-cost pm-verify probe point
TypeScript structural typing guarantees zero assignability conflict: StructDeclaration fields share no overlap with ObjectTypeDeclaration shapes
STRUCT_REGISTRY_V3 / VALUE_TYPE_REGISTRY_V3 versioned-suffix naming prevents accidental singleton collision
H-B additive approach defers ForwardProp repair — home ~/ontology/ layer is opt-in; this is the key architectural weakness vs H-A where the shim is mandatory

evaluatorReason: All 15 rejection criteria applied (R1-R15). 15/15 PASS. 0 rules triggered on winning hypothesis H-A. H-B preserved as complete alternative with full scenario coverage. winRationale is 200+ word structural argument citing WMO-031, user directive, 5 strategic dimensions. No debate initiated — all 4 debate triggers negative (scenario pass rate diff 0%; no D/L/A misclassification; 0 failure modes in T9; no ambiguous R-gate rejection). R13 context-dependent PASS: current forwardProp.healthStatus=broken IS the defect the rebuild targets; H-A structural repair validated by P-H-A singleton-identity test. R14 PASS: both prototypes buildStatus=pass. R15 PASS: H-A 22/22 passRate=1.0, H-B 16/16 passRate=1.0. ACCEPT.
winRationale: H-A (clean-slate v1.0 rebuild) selected over H-B (incremental v0.3 evolution) on strategic dimensions directly targeting NEXT_SESSION_ONTOLOGY_REBUILD.md primary objective. (1) ForwardProp Health aggregate 4.25 vs 2.0 (2.125x advantage): H-A structurally enforces via home-ontology-shim registry singleton identity (STRUCT_REGISTRY === SHIM_STRUCT_REGISTRY verified in P-H-A C-A-03a); H-B leaves as opt-in per H-B forwardPropImpact statement and H-B's own evalRunnerNotes acknowledging 'H-B's architectural weakness'. (2) Agent Composability 3.75 vs 1.75: H-A introduces /palantir-dispatch + /ontology-register enabling Phase III AI-First reach; H-B defers both skills and has incomplete MCP tool coverage. (3) D/L/A Fit 4.5 vs 3.25: H-A classifies all 5 domains (D=9, L=7, A=9, S=3, LEARN=4 = 32 primitives); H-B's Security (L2 opt-in) + Learn (ScenarioSandbox deferred) remain thin. (4) Governance Compliance 4.25 vs 3.0: H-A ships pm-verify 6/6 + L2/L3 RBAC + CapabilityToken; H-B stops at L1 enforcement. (5) 4-pillar Fidelity High vs Medium per scenarios.json. (6) User directive explicitly permits: 'schemas v1.0 major bump allowed, palantir-mini v1.0 full restructure allowed, namespace reorganization allowed, legacy deletion allowed' with severity=high negotiable=false (decision-log.constraints.breaking-changes). H-B's strengths — Reversibility 3.75, Implementation Difficulty 3.5, Risk Severity 3.25 — are acknowledged pragmatic wins traded-off per user directive. Aggregate totalMean: H-A 3.50 vs H-B 3.00 (Δ=0.50). Critical structural finding: WMO-031 ForwardProp healthStatus=broken cannot be repaired additively — adding home /ontology/ layer forces consumer extension-point change regardless of SemVer strategy, so H-A atomic approach is the only path that reliably reaches healthy state.

alternatives.name: Incremental v0.3 evolution
alternatives.preservedReason: Viable if user revokes breaking-change permission; additive primitives work without SemVer major. Serves as fallback on rejected Phase B plan. H-B prototype P-H-B 16/16 pass (passRate 1.0) proves additive approach works technically.
alternatives.keyTradeoff: Stability preserved (Reversibility 3.75, Risk Severity 3.25, Implementation Difficulty 3.5) in exchange for permanent opt-in ForwardProp repair (Health 2.0) and no Agent Composability (1.75 — no dispatcher, no /ontology-register).

alternatives.name: Hybrid (schemas v1.0 + plugin v0.3 staged)
alternatives.preservedReason: Suggested in OBS-09 but not simulated. Would reduce atomic surface by shipping schemas v1.0 first, plugin v0.3, skills later — but fractures 4-pillar coherence and delays ForwardProp repair. Flagged for contingent consideration if Phase B plan rejected and H-A deemed too high-risk.
